title: Bill Gates
html:
Bill Gates

Stub. Recurring mentor-from-afar in teen-Yahir's notes — "watch decoding bill gates" in 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda (Netflix doc had just dropped Sept 2019), then mocked self-deprecatingly a month later in 2019 10 12 hide behind bill gates books because you to sad to admit don ("Hide behind Bill Gates books because you too sad to admit don't know anything") — Yahir performing the awareness that the Gates-fixation was a coping mechanism even as he was inside it.

Source summaries

  • 2019 09 23 write scripture for brenda
  • 2019 10 12 hide behind bill gates books because you to sad to admit don
